raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made XXXX purchases on XXXX totaling {$2900.00} ( three for {$890.00} and one for {$290.00} ) with a citibank credit card ( i have been a cutomer for 7 years now, witth zero complaints or chargebacks.. These purchases were made in good faith, based on the companys clearly advertised promise that Sweeps Coins could be redeemed for cash prizes upon meeting specific requirements. On XX/XX/year>, I submitted a redemption request for {$3200.00} after fulfilling all terms, including identity verification and playthrough requirements. However, on XX/XX/year>, XXXX abruptly shut down its sweepstakes program, revoked all user balances, and disconnected all support channelseffectively " rug-pulling '' users and leaving my withdrawal unprocessed. 

I immediately filed a dispute with Citi on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX same day the platform revoked redemptions. Despite presenting clear documentationincluding prior terms of service that confirm Sweeps Coins were redeemableCiti ruled in favor of the merchant on XX/XX/XXXX. Since then, I have submitted multiple follow-up emails with additional evidence directly to Citis billing disputes department, yet they continue to claim they can not accept my emails and even have requested that I fax materialssomething I am unable to do. The instructions tthat do not work yet have a timeline attached have made the process needlessly difficult and opaque. when i have spoken to the costumer service theytold me to just email again,. and a week later said the same thing. 

To support this complaint, I have included an extensive written breakdown along with supporting documentationsuch as screenshots of original terms, email confirmations, redemption requests, and communication historyin the attached documents section. These materials also document my repeated, good-faith attempts to challenge Citis ruling, all of which have been either ignored or dismissed due to their refusal to properly receive email submissions, which I have summited to the letter of their request. I am now reaching out to the CFPB to report XXXX  fraudulent conduct and to seek assistance in recovering the nearly {$3000.00} XXXX lost due to their deceptive business practices and Citis failure to fulfill its duty to protect consumers.
